tiers.label: Grow with AI
tiers.description: High AI exposure but high demand elasticity. These roles will use AI to do more, driving up productivity and expanding the overall market for their output.
tiers.for_current_workers: Learn to use AI tools in your specialty — they'll make you more effective and help you stand out.
tiers.for_career_explorers: Strong entry — commit fully and specialize, embracing AI tools.

tiers.label: Less Immediate Change
tiers.description: Low AI exposure. These roles rely heavily on physical presence, intricate human relationships, or complex physical environments that AI models cannot automate.
tiers.for_current_workers: You have a stable foundation. AI will be a background tool rather than a central disruptor.
tiers.for_career_explorers: Good choice for long-term stability, though wage ceilings may exist.

tiers.label: Will Reorganize
tiers.description: High exposure but strong human necessity. Parts of this job will be automated, but the human-in-the-loop (for trust, regulation, or physical action) remains necessary. The job will shift, not disappear.
tiers.for_current_workers: Cross-train now — emphasize your judgment, client relationships, and physical expertise.
tiers.for_career_explorers: Enter with eyes open — be prepared for the day-to-day tasks of this role to shift.

tiers.label: High Automation Risk
tiers.description: High exposure, weak human necessity, and low demand elasticity. AI can automate the core output of this job, and making it cheaper will not unlock massive new demand.
tiers.for_current_workers: Start your pivot while you still have runway. Look for adjacent roles with higher necessity.
tiers.for_career_explorers: Look elsewhere unless you have a specific, highly-specialized niche to enter.

role_resilience_score.description: Measures how well the role itself resists AI automation across 10 attributes. Scores the job, not the labor market around it.

projected_growth.description: BLS 10-year projected employment growth rate for this occupation.

projected_job_openings.description: BLS annual projected job openings — reflects both new jobs and replacement demand.

final_ranking.description: Composite score combining role resilience (50%), projected growth (30%), and job openings (20%). Used to place each occupation into a tier.
